response:
the sacred hymn siriraag in the third mala speaks of the grace of the guru and the spirit of devotion that leads to purity and enlightenment - the soul must merge with itself to become pure - the true word of the holy name brings the spirit closer to the divine - the gene of devotion is passed on through the language of the sacred - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the soul must seek the guru's guidance to find its true path - the language of the heart is the path to the divine - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the visit to the sacred path brings the soul closer to the divine - the gene of love and devotion is the foundation of true spirituality - the spirit is united with the divine through the guru's grace - the visit to the sacred teachings is the way to inner peace - the language of the soul is the path to the divine - the spirit is cleansed through devotion and the guru's grace - the visit to the guru's presence brings the soul to enlightenment - the gene of truth is found in the sacred teachings - the spirit is transformed through the guru's guidance - the visit to the sacred path is the way to spiritual growth - the language of the heart is the key to the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the guru's grace - the visit to the sacred teachings is the way to true understanding - the gene of devotion is the foundation of the spiritual journey - the spirit is awakened through the guru's grace - the visit to the sacred path brings the soul to enlightenment - the language of the heart is the path to the divine - the spirit is cleansed through devotion and the guru's grace - the visit to the sacred teachings is the way to inner peace.  

***  

the sacred hymn emphasizes the importance of the guru's guidance and the spirit's journey towards enlightenment - the gene of devotion is passed on through the language of the sacred - the visit to the guru's presence is the key to spiritual awakening - the soul must seek the guru's guidance to find its true path - the language of the heart is the path to the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the guru's grace - the visit to the sacred teachings is the way to true understanding - the gene of love and devotion is the foundation of true spirituality - the spirit is transformed through the guru's guidance - the visit to the sacred path brings the soul to enlightenment - the language of the soul is the key to the divine - the spirit is cleansed through devotion and
